CURL:

curl --location --request POST 'http://localhost:8080/realms/tp-internal/protocol/openid-connect/token' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' \
--data-urlencode 'client_id=sample_user1' \
--data-urlencode 'client_secret=3Sdqr4igeEWs2AtsgJz4QjN1kslXjGiT' \
--data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials'

RESPONSE BODY:

{
"access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCIgOiAiSldUIiwia2lkIiA6ICJSWktWTDU4eVJpc1pIcUpkQnZueFVRVDl1WUpFMk1hRWFaLXc1d1hjbDhjIn0..FVsEOWXJrUdxT7ci_TJbw-UfVZ4Ig6oPlkLNOBhZhQxHPr4SQYlFK45bLbumUzUpl5X2RyZIkySPhkAvUR3g0b7KOjLR30MW_fGxVwG2EXX4xvSx3jZmBuDpxIqcfkIfHhT8634GmFMhTjP9bvZhDA5HZVHnTyOet9v7563qAHXWEC71rwP5hDmXzTPM9p-OLRJXXzY-LMTUFGwSEfbXOoFh1qIHc293UPKKO3RuihQSfF4gTP2igH8MWGM2ISjkGJkrLFm_Q7NlM0xOp-l8i6O6jtGpizZXwjcCnGQYzGtlNblTc1Yx_hXl1T4o5bQfGTV65HEUDGW_ngpUcOgSxg",
"expires_in": 300,
"refresh_expires_in": 0,
"token_type": "Bearer",
"not-before-policy": 0,
"scope": "email profile tf_test tf_write"
}
